name: Super Defense Robot Monki
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＳＤ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スーパーディフェンス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ロボ・モンキ
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Super Defense Robot" monster or "Orbital 7" from your hand. Once per turn: You can banish 1 Machine-Type monster from your Graveyard, then target 1 "Super Defense Robot" monster or "Orbital 7" in your Graveyard; add that target to your hand.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Super Defense Robot" monster or "Orbital 7" from your hand. Once per turn: You can banish 1 Machine-Type monster from your Graveyard, then target 1 "Super Defense Robot" monster or "Orbital 7" in your Graveyard; add that target to your hand.
